---
applyTo: "references/*.md"
---

## Reference File Instructions

When editing reference documents:

- Keep references factual and cite official first-party sources.
- Use working definitions that are consistent with the rest of this curriculum.
- Include a quick-reference table or decision guide when the document compares multiple concepts.
- Avoid duplicating content from module READMEs; link back to modules instead.
- Update the root README if a new reference file is added.
- Enforce markdown lint rules: MD022, MD032, MD034, MD047.
